title: Wonder Factory Never Dry Dough & Sand Mega Box Set - Includes 4 Tubes of 59mL Dough & 4 Tubes of 89mL Sand, Does Not Dry Out, No Gluten, and Smells Nice, Creative Toys for Children
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: HOURS OF ENDLESS FUN: Wonder Factory Never Dry Dough & Sand Set lets your child enjoy a fun, imaginative, and tactile experience with endless possibilities
A DOUGH THAT DOESN’T DRY OUT: Wonder Factory Dough and Sand doesn’t dry out. It’s also gluten-free and smells nice
4-IN-1 TOOL: 1. Roll it; 2. Stamp it; 3. Connect it; 4. Store it
REUSABLE PACKAGING: Each dough container adds to the play experience with patterns, stamps, and more
WHAT’S INSIDE: Includes 4 tubes (59mL) of dough, 4 tubes (89mL) of sand, 12 caps with fun stamps, and 6 connectors with patterns to roll into your dough and/or sand
EXPLORE CREATIVITY: Mix the dough and sand to create a new compound with a unique texture
COLOURFUL PLAYTIME: It has so many fun colours to collect for creative play. Colours and styles may vary
